responses-copilot.walkthrough.title: Responses Copilot
responses-copilot.walkthrough.descriptio: Set up Responses API models in Copilot Chat.
[Get an API key](command:responses-copilot.getApiKey) from OpenAI or your compatible provider.
[Set API Key](command:responses-copilot.setApiKey)
responses-copilot.walkthrough.showModels:
If models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show Responses Copilot models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
responses-copilot.walkthrough.advancedSe:
Customize endpoint, cache TTL, reasoning defaults, and diagnostics.
[Open settings](command:responses-copilot.openSettings)
responses-copilot.config.title: Responses Copilot
responses-copilot.config.baseUrl.descrip: Responses API base URL. Defaults to OpenAI official v1 endpoint.
responses-copilot.config.maxOutputTokens: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default (no limit). Useful for controlling costs.
responses-copilot.config.modelMaxInputTo: Default max input tokens shown in Copilot model metadata for remote models. Used when upstream does not provide token limits.
responses-copilot.config.modelMaxOutputT: Default max output tokens shown in Copilot model metadata for remote models. Used when upstream does not provide token limits.
responses-copilot.config.modelListTtlMin: TTL cache duration for remote /models list in minutes.
responses-copilot.config.reasoningEffort: Default reasoning effort used when the model picker does not override it.
responses-copilot.config.experimental.st:
**Experimental**: improve prompt-cache hit rate by pre-activating available tools.
- When the enabled tools list changes across turns, this may improve cache hit rate.
- Requests can include more function definitions, so input tokens may increase.
- This may add internal preflight tool calls to the current Copilot chat history.

Use [Configure Tools](command:workbench.action.chat.configureTools) to manage your tool list.
responses-copilot.config.debugMode.descr:
Controls diagnostic information written by Responses Copilot. Token usage is always reported to Copilot.

- **Minimal** - Token usage only.
- **Metadata** - Privacy-safe request metadata.
- **Verbose** - Full request dumps written to disk (may include sensitive content).
responses-copilot.config.debugMode.minim: Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or dumps.
responses-copilot.config.debugMode.metad: Privacy-safe metadata. Safe to share publicly. View with `Responses: Show Logs`.
responses-copilot.config.debugMode.verbo: Contains sensitive prompt content. For local debugging only.
